updates.shortBlurb: IT consulting and outsourcing company with expertise in data management, advanced analytics, machine learning and AI. Bootstrapped to 100+ customers.

updates.funding:
$250K Incubator/Accelerator funding (November 2023)

Investor: L'Oreal Open Innovation Challenge
updates.shortBlurb: AI-powered cookieless personalization platform for e-commerce. Served over 1 billion personalized experiences. RC365 bought exclusive UK rights in August 2023.
Europe's largest private AI lab expanded to Vancouver in 2023 with 10+ person team. Acquired by AMD in August 2024 for $665M. Clients included Allianz, Philips, Rolls-Royce.
updates.keyPeople: Peter Sarlin (CEO & Co-founder), Team joined AMD AI Group under Vamsi Boppana

updates.funding:
$100K CAD from DMZ Ventures (June 2024)

Pre-seed round
updates.shortBlurb: Property management software that automates 90% of leasing tasks. Won $100K at DMZ Insiders event. Integrated with Zillow in August 2024. Addresses 50% understaffing in property management.
